deterministic_setup.reason: The library POM marks servlet-api as provided, and public classes such as AbstractWebdavServlet, WebdavRequestImpl, WebdavResponseImpl, InputContextImpl, OutputContextImpl, and header parsers import or extend javax.servlet types. Existing jackrabbit-webdav tests also add servlet-api explicitly.

input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #8851 [Automation] native-image run fails for org.apache.jackrabbit:jackrabbit-webdav:2.0-beta4; label=fails-native-image-run; body_chars=8015

risks: No Docker image or environment/system property requirement was found.
The native-image run failure shown in the issue may still be caused by version-specific behavior or reachability metadata, not by setup alone.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: jackrabbit-webdav exposes server/request/response APIs that directly depend on javax.servlet, but the artifact declares servlet-api as provided, so tests need an explicit servlet API dependency to cover those classes.
